name: project-routines
description: A suite of personal engineering routines — run on demand or wired up to scheduled automation and triggers

plugins.name: routines
plugins.description: A suite of memory-backed engineering-routine agents — code-simplifier (@agent-routines:code-simplifier) for incremental code cleanup, and retro (@agent-routines:retro), which fans out to subagents for a weekly retrospective. Run on demand or on a schedule.
